summary: Executed V0.8.5 System Governance Upgrade. Codified the 'Pre-Flight Plan', 'Strict Separation of Duties (SoD)', and 'Anti-Token-Explosion' protocols into the bilingual documentation portal (documentation/EN/core-concepts/governance-protocols.md and documentation/ZH/core-concepts/governance-protocols.md). This formally establishes the cognitive and orchestration governance required for the Orchestrator to securely and smartly delegate complex tasks without cognitive degradation.
